name: Joost Klein | Attached user
description:
My stummy hurts, ooh-ha-ooh-ah-ooh-ah you-uou, Tryna ditch this girl, but she's stuck to me like glue-ue-ue, Only like the money if it's blue-ue-ue-ue, Baby out here making hits here if you wonder what I do

-Mayo, no fries!

Joost and Bbno$

I’m running out of ideas yet again so ofc its based off of song lyrics :) 200 less tokens on this one than i’d prefer but whatever :L

You can’t get off of him (attachment issues? Idk its your persona you pick) even though he tries his best to keep distance.

Like usual: Plz give me requests i beg you i need ideas for bots :d
